008 *

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5;
018
019import java.io.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
024
025/**
026 * Reference implementation of the public {@link TokenReader} surface for the JSON5 format.
027 *
028 * <p>
029 * Subclasses {@link JsonTokenReader} to add the JSON5 dialect's relaxations:
030 * <ul>
031 *    <li>Strings can be single-quoted, double-quoted, or unquoted bare identifiers.
032 *    <li>Field names can be single-quoted, double-quoted, or unquoted bare identifiers.
033 *    <li>Trailing commas before <c>]</c> / <c>}</c> are allowed.
034 *    <li>Missing values in arrays / objects emit {@link TokenType#VALUE_NULL}.
035 *    <li>JavaScript comments (<c>//</c> line, <c>/* &#42;/</c> block) are tolerated &mdash; already
036 *       accepted by the parent class.
037 * </ul>
038 *
039 * <p>
040 * The cursor is a true O(1)-memory streaming cursor ({@link #isStreaming()} == <jk>true</jk>).
041 *
042 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
043 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe.
044 *    <li>The cursor is purely structural; object swaps and {@code @Schema} annotations have no
045 *       effect.  Use the POJO databind path on {@link Json5Parser} for those.
046 * </ul>
047 */
048@SuppressWarnings({
049   "resource" // The cursor's underlying ParserPipe is owned by the caller via try-with-resources on the cursor itself; Eclipse JDT flags the inner pipe as unclosed but that's by design.
050})
051public class Json5TokenReader extends JsonTokenReader {
052
053   /**
054    * Constructor with default settings.
055    *
056    * @param pipe The parser input pipe to read from.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
057    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying reader.
058    */
059   public Json5TokenReader(ParserPipe pipe) throws IOException {
060      super(pipe);
061   }
062
063   /**
064    * Constructor used by {@link Json5ParserSession#parseTokens(Object)} to plumb the calling
065    * session through so that {@link #read(Class)} can delegate to the JSON5 databind path.
066    *
067    * @param pipe The parser input pipe to read from.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
068    * @param settings The cursor-level settings.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
069    * @param session The {@link Json5ParserSession} for {@link #read(Class)} delegation, or
070    *    <jk>null</jk> to disable {@code read}.
071    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying reader.
072    */
073   public Json5TokenReader(ParserPipe pipe, Settings settings, Json5ParserSession session) throws IOException {
074      super(pipe, settings, session);
075   }
076
077   // =================================================================================
078   // JSON5 dialect relaxations
079   // =================================================================================
080
081   @Override /* JsonTokenReader */
082   protected boolean allowsTrailingComma() {
083      return true;
084   }
085
086   @Override /* JsonTokenReader */
087   protected void readValueStart(int c) throws IOException, ParseException {
088      // Missing-value: a leading comma or container-end at value position emits VALUE_NULL and
089      // re-injects the structural char so the next state transition picks it up.
090      if (c == ',' || c == ']' || c == '}') {
091         r.unread();
092         currentToken = TokenType.VALUE_NULL;
093         afterValue();
094         return;
095      }
096      // Single-quoted strings (JSON5).
097      if (c == '\'') {
098         r.unread();
099         currentString = maybeTrimString(readString());
100         currentToken = TokenType.VALUE_STRING;
101         afterValue();
102         return;
103      }
104      // Bare identifier as a string value (e.g. `[foo, bar]` -> ["foo", "bar"]).
105      if (isBareStart(c)) {
106         r.unread();
107         // Bare identifiers might also be the keyword literals true/false/null — distinguish.
108         var word = readBareWord();
109         switch (word) {
110            case "true":  currentBoolean = true;  currentToken = TokenType.VALUE_BOOLEAN; afterValue(); return;
111            case "false": currentBoolean = false; currentToken = TokenType.VALUE_BOOLEAN; afterValue(); return;
112            case "null":  currentToken = TokenType.VALUE_NULL; afterValue(); return;
113            default:
114               currentString = maybeTrimString(word);
115               currentToken = TokenType.VALUE_STRING;
116               afterValue();
117               return;
118         }
119      }
120      super.readValueStart(c);
121   }
122
123   @Override /* JsonTokenReader */
124   protected void readFieldNameOrEndObject(int c) throws IOException, ParseException {
125      if (c == '}') {
126         popContainer();
127         currentToken = TokenType.END_OBJECT;
128         afterValue();
129         return;
130      }
131      // Single-quoted field name.
132      if (c == '\'') {
133         r.unread();
134         currentFieldName = maybeTrimString(readString());
135         currentToken = TokenType.FIELD_NAME;
136         state = S02_expectColon;
137         return;
138      }
139      // Bare identifier field name.
140      if (isBareStart(c)) {
141         r.unread();
142         currentFieldName = maybeTrimString(readBareWord());
143         currentToken = TokenType.FIELD_NAME;
144         state = S02_expectColon;
145         return;
146      }
147      super.readFieldNameOrEndObject(c);
148   }
149
150   @Override /* JsonTokenReader */
151   protected void readCommaOrEndArray(int c) throws IOException, ParseException {
152      if (c == ']') {
153         popContainer();
154         currentToken = TokenType.END_ARRAY;
155         afterValue();
156         return;
157      }
158      if (c != ',')
159         throw parseException("Expected ',' or ']' but got ''{0}''", (char) c);
160      var c2 = readSkipWsAndComments();
161      if (c2 == -1)
162         throw parseException("Unexpected end of input after ','");
163      // JSON5 trailing comma: `[1,]` is legal — `]` here closes the array.
164      if (c2 == ']') {
165         popContainer();
166         currentToken = TokenType.END_ARRAY;
167         afterValue();
168         return;
169      }
170      state = S00_expectValue;
171      readValueStart(c2);
172   }
173
174   @Override /* JsonTokenReader */
175   protected void readCommaOrEndObject(int c) throws IOException, ParseException {
176      if (c == '}') {
177         popContainer();
178         currentToken = TokenType.END_OBJECT;
179         afterValue();
180         return;
181      }
182      if (c != ',')
183         throw parseException("Expected ',' or '}' but got ''{0}''", (char) c);
184      var c2 = readSkipWsAndComments();
185      if (c2 == -1)
186         throw parseException("Unexpected end of input after ','");
187      // JSON5 trailing comma: `{a:1,}` is legal — `}` here closes the object.
188      if (c2 == '}') {
189         popContainer();
190         currentToken = TokenType.END_OBJECT;
191         afterValue();
192         return;
193      }
194      state = S01_expectFieldName;
195      readFieldNameOrEndObject(c2);
196   }
197
198   @Override /* JsonTokenReader */
199   protected String readString() throws IOException, ParseException {
200      // Defer to the parent for double- and single-quoted strings.  Detect whether the upcoming
201      // quote character is a single or double quote, and run the same escape-handling state
202      // machine but anchored to the chosen quote.  The parent class only handles double-quoted
203      // strings, so we hand-roll a thin variant for single-quoted.
204      var qc = r.peek();
205      if (qc == '\'')
206         return readSingleQuotedString();
207      return super.readString();
208   }
209
210   @SuppressWarnings({
211      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for single-quoted-string escape-handling state machine.
212   })
213   private String readSingleQuotedString() throws IOException, ParseException {
214      r.mark();
215      var qc = r.read();  // consume '
216      if (qc != '\'')
217         throw parseException("Did not find quote character marking beginning of string");
218      String s = null;
219      var inEscape = false;
220      var c = 0;
221      while (c != -1) {
222         c = r.read();
223         if (inEscape) {
224            switch (c) {
225               case 'n': r.replace('\n'); break;
226               case 'r': r.replace('\r'); break;
227               case 't': r.replace('\t'); break;
228               case 'f': r.replace('\f'); break;
229               case 'b': r.replace('\b'); break;
230               case '\\': r.replace('\\'); break;
231               case '/': r.replace('/'); break;
232               case '\'': r.replace('\''); break;
233               case '"': r.replace('"'); break;
234               case 'u': {
235                  var hex = r.read(4);
236                  try {
237                     r.replace(Integer.parseInt(hex, 16), 6);
238                  } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") NumberFormatException e) {
239                     throw parseException("Invalid Unicode escape sequence in string");
240                  }
241                  break;
242               }
243               default:
244                  throw parseException("Invalid escape sequence in string");
245            }
246            inEscape = false;
247         } else {
248            if (c == '\\') {
249               inEscape = true;
250               r.delete();
251            } else if (c == '\'') {
252               s = r.getMarked(1, -1);
253               break;
254            }
255         }
256      }
257      if (s == null)
258         throw parseException("Unterminated string");
259      return s;
260   }
261
262   private String readBareWord() throws IOException, ParseException {
263      // The leading char was already validated via isBareStart(); since every bare-start char is
264      // also a valid bare-continuation char, the loop consumes it on the first iteration.
265      r.mark();
266      while (true) {
267         var c = r.read();
268         if (c == -1 || !isBareCont(c)) {
269            if (c != -1) r.unread();
270            return r.getMarked();
271         }
272      }
273   }
274
275   private static boolean isBareStart(int c) {
276      return Character.isLetter(c) || c == '_' || c == '$';
277   }
278
279   private static boolean isBareCont(int c) {
280      return Character.isLetterOrDigit(c) || c == '_' || c == '$';
281   }
282
283   // Local trim helper — the parent's maybeTrim is private and not visible to this subclass.
284   private String maybeTrimString(String s) {
285      if (s == null || !settings.trimStrings())
286         return s;
287      return s.trim();
288   }
289}
